推荐场景: 博物馆导览屏｜听懂说明顺序
60秒任务: 「简单说明」：公告主旨/影响判断；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 公告｜通知｜原因｜时间地点｜简短说明｜主旨理解
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let me explain it simply.（开始说明）
The main idea is ___.（说明主旨）
First, you need to ___.（说明步骤一）
Then you can ___.（说明步骤二）
The reason is that ___.（说明原因）
It means you should ___.（解释含义）
This part is important because ___.（强调重点）
You don’t need to do it today.（说明无需行动）
Could you give me an example?（请求例子）
I understand the first part, but not the second.（说明理解范围）
So the problem is not the time, but the location.（澄清重点）
Let me repeat that in my own words.（复述）
Did I get that right?（确认理解）
That makes sense now.（表达理解）
I know what to do next.（行动闭环）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: main idea, reason, example, step, problem, location, part
Verbs: explain, mean, repeat, understand, clarify, follow
Adjectives / Adverbs: simple, important, clear, confusing
Time / Place: first, then, today, next
Chunks: main idea, give an example, in my own words, get that right, makes sense
